name: cross-repo-state-sync-impl
scope: v7.8.3 release umbrella: 5-phase rollout (V2 + V9 + snapshot protocol + D-3 + C-4 + state_owner schema + 62-feature backfill + morphed C-5 + D-1 reverse-sync GH Action + Phase 4 cutover ceremony). Gates HADF Phase 2-bis Sub-exp 1 launch.
success_metrics: 100% of state.json files in either repo have state_owner field within 14 days of Phase 2 ship
V2 (CACHE_HITS_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_DRIFT) firing on at least one production commit before HADF Phase 2-bis Sub-exp 1 launch
All 4 framework calibration targets achieved before HADF Phase 2-bis Sub-exp 1 launch
kill_criteria: Reverse-sync PRs create gate-firing storm (>10 false-positive failures in first week of Phase 3 production) -> halt Phase 3
state_owner backfill triggers integrity-cycle regression on >5 features within 72h post-merge -> roll back schema
V2 enforcement fires on >3 already-shipped features (false positives) -> revert to advisory + 7-day calibration
HADF Phase 2-bis Sub-exp 1 launch BLOCKED until all 5 phases ship AND each phase calibration targets are met
kill_criteria_resolution: Reverse-sync gate-firing storm: NOT TRIGGERED. Single reverse-sync PR (FT2 PR #301) merged cleanly with 7/8 CI checks green; framework integrity gates all pass.
62-feature backfill: NO integrity-cycle regression. PR #300 merged with 0 new findings; pm-framework/pr-integrity bot reports same baseline as main.
V2 enforcement false positives: 0 fires on shipped features. Gate runs on all 63 state.json files post-Phase-2 with no false positives.

HADF Phase 2-bis blocking criterion: ACTIVELY ENFORCED. All 5 phases shipped + cutover round-trip end-to-end certified. Per-phase calibration targets verified. HADF Phase 2-bis Sub-exp 1 NOW UNBLOCKED.

tasks.name: V2 + V9 + snapshot protocol + tests/framework infra
D-3 unified PR cite cache (FT2 side)
Phase 4 cutover initial state.json + workflow hotfix + re-trigger (3 attempts)
FT2-side reverse-sync auto-PR (mirror state.json with sync_origin marker)
F11/F12/F13 v7.9 candidates from cutover dogfood findings
This PR: state.json transitions to complete + final snapshot + HADF unblock verification
tasks.note: Self-referential: this closure PR documents the state.json complete transition; status='done' marks it complete because the PR-being-authored IS the closure act

merge.note: Multi-PR Feature; PR list in tasks[] above. No single 'merge PR'.

research.note: Brainstorm session (HADF Phase 2-bis brainstorm + 3 cross-references audit + Phase C/D state-sync analysis)

tasks.note: Plan written: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-11-cross-repo-state-sync-impl.md (10807 words, 5 phases x 40 tasks x 120 TDD steps)

implement.note: Phases 0-3 implementation via subagent-driven-development (Haiku for mechanical, Sonnet for integration). 5 PRs across 2 repos.

test.note: Continuous: 12/12 framework tests, 4/4 aggregator tests, 35/35 + 63/63 D-3 retroactive validation, 47/47 (then 62/62) backfill verification

review.note: Per-task spec compliance + code quality reviews via subagent dispatches; user approval gate before each PR merge

merge.note: 5 PRs merged: #298, #299, fitme-story#86, #300, fitme-story#87 (Phases 0-3); + Phase 4 chain: fitme-story#88+#89+#90, FT2#301, #302, #303, fitme-story#91 (10 PRs total)

framework_dogfooding_catches.caught_in: fitme-story PR #88 merge to main fired the reverse-sync workflow which failed in 0s with workflow file load error
framework_dogfooding_catches.fixed_via: fitme-story PR #89 hotfix moved secrets.* check from job-level if to step-level env-var indirection

framework_dogfooding_catches.caught_in: post-hotfix workflow_dispatch ran 4s success but opened no FT2 PR (HEAD~1 diff window doesn't see cutover commit when hotfix lands between)
framework_dogfooding_catches.fixed_via: fitme-story PR #90 third attempt via path-filter-matching state.json modification

framework_dogfooding_catches.caught_in: FT2 PR #303 case study had bare PR #72 reference interpreted as FT2 PR

unlocks: HADF Phase 2-bis Sub-exp 1 launch (per spec section 3.5 calibration targets all met)
Track 6 (HADF gate activation post-Sub-exp-3 verdict) is now eligible to proceed once Phase 2-bis completes
Future fitme-story-native features can use the established v7.8.3 round-trip without ceremony
